title: myosotis palustris var. stolonifera
intro: Myosotis palustris var. stolonifera, also known as creeping forget-me-not, is a variety of the forget-me-not plant that is characterized by its creeping habit and stolons. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to soothe sore throats and wounds. The health benefits of Myosotis palustris var. stolonifera include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing, making it a popular herbal remedy for skin conditions and minor injuries. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used depending on the desired application.
